TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sandimen Nsgan Sandimen o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 185.9 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 94.02 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 85.25 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,698, sapah o 2,296, seejiq tnpusu 7,320 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 95%(Paywang, Rukay). Paywang, Rukay ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Sandimen o niqan 10 alang ni maxal 12. 12 o, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: sandim…ôn nsgan sandim…ôn o gaga nsgan piŇčtuŇč, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o ***.* km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o *,***, sapańß o *,***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu *,*** ńßiji, knńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **%(pajwaŇč, …ĺukaj). pajwaŇč, …ĺukaj ka ńßba…ĺaw balaj alaŇč ńßini. njusan qpańßan nsgan sandim…ôn o niqan ** alaŇč ni maxal **. ** o, timu…ĺ , t…üa*at…üa*aŇč , *al…üulu , pa…ĺid…ĺajan , saga…ĺan , talamakau , ¶a*ak , d…üin…ôl…ü…ôpan , t…üail…üakiŇč , kiŇčdal…ĺuwan…ô , t…üuku*ul…ü , t…üus…ôpajuan . pusupnjańßan patas
S.FORM: Sandimen Nsgan Sandimen o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 185.9 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 94.02 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 85.25 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,698, sapah o 2,296, seejiq tnpusu 7,320 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 95%(Paywang, Rukay). Paywang, Rukay ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Sandimen o niqan 10 alang ni maxal 12. 12 o, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . pusupnyahan patas
